title: マヤノトップガン登場！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Mayano Top Gun is a naturally gifted racer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She dreams of running in exciting races where she
can "twinkle." Her journey towards the Twinkle
Series starts now.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As her trainer, I vow to help her grow into a
spectacular racer.
